headline: A Google employee allegedly used inside information to win $1.2 million on Polymarket
summary: A Google employee is charged with fraud for allegedly winning $1.2 million on Polymarket. He reportedly used confidential Google data on Search trends to inform his bets. Prosecutors claim he knew the outcome of wagers before the public.

headline: Apple’s newest iPad Air is up to $100 off for the first time
summary: Apple's newest iPad Air is now available with discounts of up to $100. This is the first significant price drop for the latest model. The 11-inch, 128GB Wi-Fi version starts at $519.99 on Amazon.

headline: All the news about Ferrari's polarizing Luce EV
summary: Ferrari's new Luce EV, a four-door electric sedan, faces criticism for its design. Designed with Jony Ive's LoveFrom, it deviates from traditional Ferrari aesthetics. The polarizing launch coincided with a drop in Ferrari's stock.

headline: The new Halide camera app launches with film looks and an upgraded photo editor
summary: Lux Optics has released the Halide Mark III camera app for iPhone and iPad. The app features a new film simulation engine and five unique 'Looks.' Users can apply these film-like effects directly when taking photos.

headline: Paralives Early Access Review
summary: An early access review for the life simulator 'Paralives' has been published. The game is praised for its striking art style and promising ideas. It's noted for being somewhat unpolished, typical for early access titles.

headline: Opinion: With A $949 Steam Deck, The Steam Machine Will Probably Be Very Expensive
summary: An opinion piece speculates on the high price of the upcoming Steam Machine. Rising PC gaming hardware costs are cited as a major factor. The Steam Deck's $949 price point suggests the Steam Machine will be over $1,000.

headline: Ditch the Bubble Level, The Fanttik D2 Pocket 2-Axis Osram Green Laser Level Is Priced Under $30
summary: The Fanttik D2 Pocket 2-Axis Osram Green Laser Level is available for under $30. This compact tool offers precise leveling capabilities. It's presented as an upgrade from traditional bubble levels.

headline: Get a 5-Pack of 60W USB Type-C Cables for $7.50 (Averages Out to a Mere $1.50 Per Cable)
summary: A deal offers a 5-pack of 60W USB Type-C cables for just $7.50. This brings the cost per cable down to an average of $1.50. These universal cables are compatible with devices like Nintendo Switch, Steam Deck, iPhone, and Samsung Galaxy.

headline: 'We are at risk of a lost generation': One in six young people will not be in work or training in five years without action, report warns
summary: A report warns that one in six young people may be out of work or training in five years. This could lead to a 'lost generation' without immediate action. The review highlights that career paths are increasingly out of reach for many youth.

headline: I just want freedom from fear, says girl raped by teenage boys as sentences to be reviewed
summary: A teenage girl bravely shares her story after being raped by teenage boys. She describes suffering from flashbacks and living in constant fear since the attack. The sentences given to her attackers are currently under review.

headline: Girl tells BBC she is 'scared to go out' after teenage rapists spared jail time
summary: A teenage girl expressed to the BBC her fear of going out after her rapists avoided jail. She lives in fear following the attack by teenage boys. The sentences for her attackers are currently being reviewed.

headline: An unhealthy focus on sex - Married at First Sight UK insiders on show's 'toxic' culture
summary: Insiders reveal a 'toxic culture' behind the scenes of Married at First Sight UK. Allegations include an 'unhealthy focus on sex' within the reality show. This comes after two women claimed they were raped while participating.
